lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mailaa vich jot apaaraa |
lines.english: Within the polluted mind and body is the Light of the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase sach drirraae man tan saachai raataa he |11|
lines.english: He Himself forgives, and implants the Truth. The mind and body are then attuned to the True Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੜ ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਬਹੁ ਹਟ ਬਾਜਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: garr kaaeaa andar bahu hatt baajaaraa |
lines.english: In the fortress of the body there are many shops and bazaars;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: haumai maar sadaa man niramal rasanaa sev sukhadaataa he |12|
lines.english: Conquering egotism, the mind becomes immaculate forever; with his tongue, he serves the Lord, the Giver of peace. ||12||
One who understands the Guru's Teachings, contemplates this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sadaa dar sohai haumai maar pachhaataa he |13|
lines.english: In His Court, one is embellished forever with the Word of the Guru's Shabad; he conquers egotism and realizes the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਅਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich naam hai at apaaraa |
lines.english: within them is the Naam, the Name of the utterly infinite Lord.
How can the poor wretch estimate its worth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੋਲਾਏ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade tol tolaae antar sabad pachhaataa he |14|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is weighed, and so the Shabad is realized deep within. ||14||
The jewel is priceless, inaccessible and infinite.
Only extend the extension of attachment to Maya.
The great volumes of the Simritees and the Shaastras
The Creator Himself acts, and causes all to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਪੜਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: moorakh parreh sabad na boojheh guramukh viralai jaataa he |15|
lines.english: The fools read them, but do not understand the Word of the Shabad. How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, understand. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee jug jug eko jaataa he |16|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, one is blessed with glorious greatness, and throughout the ages, the One Lord is known. ||16||9||
Through the True Word of His Bani, Truth is implanted deep within.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ਆਪੇ ਅਗਮ ਅਥਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: agam agochar keemat nahee paaee aape agam athaahaa he |1|
lines.english: He is inaccessible and unfathomable; He cannot be evaluated. He Himself is inaccessible and immeasurable. ||1||
The Word of the Shabad is the Destroyer of pain.
Serve the True Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saacho seveh saach kamaaveh naame sach samaahaa he |2|
lines.english: They serve the True Lord and practice Truth; through the Name, they are absorbed in the True Lord. ||2||
The True Lord Himself makes Truth pervasive.
He attaches some humble beings to the Truth.
He attaches them to true devotional worship.
The Primal Lord unites His devotees in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਰੁ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh vanaj kareh par aap pachhaaneh |
lines.english: The Gurmukh trades, and understands his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਇਸੁ ਜਨਮੈ ਕਾ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saachee baanee sadaa gun gaavai is janamai kaa laahaa he |3|
lines.english: One who sings forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord, through the True Word of His Bani, earns the profit of this life. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਚੇ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahu sache vanajaare poonjee naam visaahaa he |4|
lines.english: True is the banker, and True are His traders, who buy the merchandise of the Naam. ||4||
He Himself fashions and creates the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ekas bin ko avar na jaaneh |
lines.english: He knows no other than the One Lord.
He inspires a few to realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਚੇ ਕਾਟੇ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਫਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh se jan saache kaatte jam kaa faahaa he |5|
lines.english: Those humble beings who serve the True Guru are true. He snaps the noose of death from around their necks. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਜੇਵੜਾ ਗਲਿ ਫਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh fireh sadaa andh kamaaveh jam kaa jevarraa gal faahaa he |6|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs wander around forever, acting blindly. Death has strung his noose around their necks. ||6||
He destroys, creates, embellishes and fashions all beings,
and attaches them to duality, attachment and Maya.
He Himself forgives, and enjoins us to serve the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਸਾਚਾ ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin naam dhiaae saachaa is jag meh naamo laahaa he |7|
lines.english: Night and day, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the True Lord, and earn the profit of the Naam in this world. ||7||
Through the Guru's Teachings, the Naam comes to dwell within the mind.
He Himself is True, and True is His Name.
The Gurmukh bestows it, and enshrines it within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਸਿਰਿ ਚੂਕਾ ਕਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jin man vasiaa se jan soheh tin sir chookaa kaahaa he |8|
lines.english: Noble and exalted are those, within whose mind the Lord abides. Their heads are free of strife. ||8||
He is inaccessible and unfathomable; His value cannot be appraised.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਰੁਦ੍ਰੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan rudru tis kee sevaa |
lines.english: Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੰਗੈ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sadaa sabad saalaahee gunadaataa lekhaa koe na mangai taahaa he |9|
lines.english: No one calls that person to account, who praises the Word of the Shabad, the Giver of virtue. ||9||
By Guru's Grace, He dwells within the mind.
Even they cannot find the limits of the unseen, unknowable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੂ ਅਪਣੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jin kau nadar kareh too apanee guramukh alakh lakhaahaa he |10|
lines.english: Those who are blessed by Your Glance of Grace, become Gurmukh, and comprehend the incomprehensible. ||10||
